grades.expectation: Response mentions checking competentperson.co.uk to verify if installer was registered
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions searching competentperson.co.uk by postcode and installation date

grades.expectation: Response mentions FENSA specifically as the relevant competent person scheme for windows
grades.reason: FENSA is mentioned multiple times as the primary scheme, along with CERTASS

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes between self-certification (competent person) and local authority routes
grades.reason: Clearly distinguishes between competent person schemes (FENSA/CERTASS) and building control regularisation as separate routes

grades.expectation: Response warns about the 'no approach' rule before pursuing indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'Do NOT contact building control until you've decided on strategy. Any contact invalidates indemnity insurance' and reinforces this at the end

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part L (energy efficiency/insulation) as relevant regulation for windows
grades.reason: Specifically mentions 'Part L (thermal performance) compliance is rarely enforced retrospectively'
